hooks.command: if [ -d docs/coding-sessions ]; then latest=$(ls -t docs/coding-sessions/*_session-summary.md 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); if [ -n "$latest" ]; then echo "Context from previous session ($(basename "$latest")):"; awk '/^## Pending Tasks/{flag=1; print; next} /^##/{flag=0} flag' "$latest"; fi; fi
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+commit'; then echo 'Commit formatting required. Run commit-assistant first.' >&2; exit 2; fi
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push'; then echo 'Pre-push validation required. Run push-assistant agent first.' >&2; exit 2; fi
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create'; then echo 'Code review required. Run pr-publisher agent first.' >&2; exit 2; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then if grep -qE 'console\.log|debugger|TODO|FIXME' "$file"; then echo "Warning: Detected debug statements or TODOs in $file. Review before commit." >&2; fi; fi
